Maxxim
How it works The 3D process For partners Our work About Tell us about your business

Within reach of every owner who was told it wasn't for them.

Maxxim exists for a market where no good business loses to a worse one simply because it couldn't afford to look the part.

AI made production cheap. It made judgement precious.

Anyone can generate marketing now. Almost nobody will stand behind it. The trust gap between what AI can produce and what a client will sign off on has not closed, and it will not close until a named human stands behind the outcome at every gate.

That is the architecture of Maxxim, not a feature of it. The engine runs at AI speed. The human stays at the wheel. The client owns what gets built.

Where the method comes from

Proven, not invented for a pitch.

The 3D methodology, Discover, Design, Deploy, is Clent Jewell's. He built it over years of real client work at Jewell Projects, with documented successes long before AI entered the picture.

What Maxxim does is productise that method and scale it with AI: the same structured intelligence process, the same human judgement at the gates, now delivered in days instead of months. We run the method on ourselves. The site you are reading, and the brand guidelines behind it, came through the same engine.

The people behind it.

Raef Akehurst

Co-founder · Platform and engineering

Builds the platform that lets AI carry the 80 percent, and keeps the engine honest, fast and secure.

Paul Clancy

Co-founder · Strategy and operations

Runs the operating model: the partners, the checkpoints and the standard the work is held to.

Clent Jewell

Founding partner · Creator of the 3D methodology

Built and sharpened Discover, Design, Deploy over years of real client work at Jewell Projects, long before AI entered the picture.

What we stand for.

01

A human stands behind it

Every output that ships carries a named partner’s sign-off. Accountability is a person, not a policy.

02

Finished beats busy

We are judged on outcomes you can point at, not process exhaust. A plan and a launched site, not a pile of activity.

03

You own it from day one

Strategy, source and assets are handed over as they are approved. No lock-in, no hostage-taking.

04

Show the work, not the smoke

The 3D library makes the work visible. You can see every output type before you spend a dollar.

05

Earn the trust, then keep it

We would rather under-claim and over-deliver. Proof, not adjectives, does the persuading.

Judge us by the work.

The method is visible, the outputs are named and the first checkpoint is yours to approve before you commit.

Tell us about your business
Maxxim

The proven method, run by a human, at AI speed. Discover, Design, Deploy, then the system learns and the next cycle gets sharper.
